chunks.text: Industry - EECS at Berkeley A Partner to Industry For over half a century, Berkeley EECS has been at the forefront of research that has led to important advancements in semiconductor and MEMS devices, design technology, computer architecture, operating systems and databases, and wired and wireless networking. Berkeley graduates are at the core of today’s Information Technology industry. Learn about Corporate Access 2018 Internship Open House Corporate Access The EECS Department recognizes institutions which give to the department annually with first tier access to our graduating students. Recruit Our Students External Advisory Board The EAB was established to help the department fulfill its mission of educating leaders, creating knowledge, and serving society. See Our EAB Members EECS Assistant Profs. Nika Haghtalab, Preeya Khana and Sophia Shao, 2024 Sloan Foundation Fellowship Recipients Innovation and Leadership From Business Insider power rankings to prizes for innovation, Berkeley EECS is a fountainhead of creative people and ideas. Read About Us in the News Fei Fei Li gives her talk “From Seeing to Doing: Ascending the Ladder of Visual Intelligence” on April 23, 2025. EECS Joint Colloquium The weekly EECS Colloquium offers our faculty a chance to invite speakers offering a wide range of experiences covering topics in both Electrical Engineering and Computer Science to engage with the department. View Lectures Entrepreneurial Spirit UC Berkeley is ranked #1 for VC-backed entrepreneurs in PitchBook’s University Rankings for 2025 .
